mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO youtube_comment_sentiment_lexicon_suggestions ( history_id, user_id, sentiment_item_id, action, term, score, reason, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{historyId}, #{userId}, #{sentimentItemId}, #{it.action}, #{it.term}, #{it.score}, #{it.reason}, 'PENDING', NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id AS id, sentiment_item_id AS sentimentItemId, action AS action, term AS term, score AS score, reason AS reason, status AS status FROM youtube_comment_sentiment_lexicon_suggestions WHERE history_id = #{historyId} AND (#{userId} IS NULL OR user_id = #{userId}) AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update:
UPDATE youtube_comment_sentiment_lexicon_suggestions SET status = 'APPLIED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE history_id = #{historyId} AND (#{userId} IS NULL OR user_id = #{userId}) AND status = 'PENDING' AND id IN
#{id}

UPDATE youtube_comment_sentiment_lexicon_suggestions SET status = 'REJECTED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE history_id = #{historyId} AND (#{userId} IS NULL OR user_id = #{userId}) AND status = 'PENDING' AND id IN
#{id}
